payload.message: You are Vale (Chief Relocation Officer) reporting through Conrad. Provide a concise relocation check-in for Dom: (1) where we are, (2) what is left, (3) what we are ahead on, (4) what we are behind on, (5) top 3 actions for today with owners. Focus on Spain/Portugal relocation dependencies and deadlines.

jobs.name: danai-international-opportunities-digest
jobs.description: Daily 8am executive briefing for Danai international opportunities

payload.message: Deep research task: Find top 5-10 international opportunities for Danai L. Pointer (senior communications/PR/government affairs leader) with priority on Spain/Portugal and optional global roles if exceptional fit. Run TWO searches daily: (1) direct open roles; (2) staffing/search firms placing senior international communications talent. Create executive briefing with concise fit rationale, immediate next steps, and relocation/location constraints from LA. Then email briefing to dom@freedomandcoffee.co and danaipointer@gmail.com using available Gmail tooling. Keep it actionable for same-day follow-through.

jobs.name: Dom Morning Briefing 9AM
jobs.description: Daily 9am briefing with overdue tasks needing Dom input

payload.message: Generate Dom’s concise 9:00 AM morning briefing. First section: Questionnaire + Goals Capture (top priority). Include overnight research as configured, overdue items requiring Dom input, top 3 priorities, calendar, risks, relocation critical path, health reminders, and proactive plan. After drafting, EMAIL the full briefing to dom@freedomandcoffee.co (subject: 'Dom Morning Briefing - {{date}}'). Keep crisp and actionable.

jobs.name: Daily Proactive Improvement Surprise
jobs.description: 9:30am daily completed workflow/project improvement surprise for Dom

payload.message: You are Conrad in COO mode. Complete one proactive improvement to Dom’s existing workflows/projects/tasks each run (completed, not planned). Delegate to sub-agents first where applicable. Then EMAIL Dom a concise completion note to dom@freedomandcoffee.co with subject 'Daily Surprise Complete - {{date}}' including what shipped, why it matters, and artifact location.

jobs.name: n8n-failure-audit-48h
jobs.description: Every 48h n8n failure audit on Railway

payload.message: Check the Railway n8n instance (project exciting-harmony, service n8n) for failed automations in the last 48 hours. Report: workflow name, time, error, and whether issue is platform-level vs workflow-level. If unhealthy, suggest concrete fix steps.

Run the Kalshi weather market scan for tomorrow's markets. Pull NWS forecasts for all 16 cities, screen against v2 strategy rules in memory/kalshi-strategy-v2.md, then hit the Kalshi API for actual contract prices. Report any targets that pass all filters. If nothing passes, say so. Send results to Dom on Telegram.

You are Vale (Chief Relocation Officer) reporting through Conrad. Provide an evening relocation check-in for Dom: (1) what moved today, (2) what slipped and why, (3) updated ahead/behind status, (4) tomorrow's top 3 relocation actions with owners. Keep it concise and actionable.

jobs.name: vale-weekly-relocation-digest-email
jobs.description: Sunday relocation digest email to Dom + Danai

payload.message: You are Vale (Chief Relocation Officer) reporting through Conrad. Create a weekly relocation digest for Dom + Danai for Sunday family brunch. Include: (1) wins this week, (2) what is ahead, (3) what is behind, (4) dependency/risk flags, (5) next-week priorities in strict order of operations. Then send it via gog gmail from an available connected account to: danaipointer@gmail.com and dominique.deleon@gmail.com with subject 'Weekly Relocation Digest — Spain/Portugal Plan'. If email send fails, post the full digest in chat and clearly mark SEND_FAILED.

payload.text: Reminder: It's Monday morning. Time for Dom's weekly legal check-in. Remind him to: (1) Send status email to James Castle (Liberty Mutual case) if still awaiting response, (2) Check in with Arash Law on the trucking PI case if needed, (3) Ask Dom for a symptom journal update — how's the back, heel, and mobility this week? Log the entry to projects/legal/symptom-journal.md. Keep it conversational, not clinical.
Reminder: Take a change of clothes to the gym so you can shower before Dr. Applegate at 2:30!

Reminder: Dom, you need to send emails to BOTH attorneys today: (1) James Castle — Liberty Mutual property case status check, (2) Arash Law — trucking PI case status check. You flagged this last night. Don't let it slip. Want me to draft both?

WAKE UP DOM! 6:30am boxing class in 45 minutes, sparring at 7:30. You got maybe 3 hours of sleep but you committed to this. Get up, hydrate, eat something light. Your sparring tips are ready at output/sparring-prep.md. Let's go champ!
🥊 Reminder: Sparring in 1 hour (6:30pm). Hydrate, light snack, loosen up. You got this champ.

🎰 KALSHI DAILY P&L REPORT: Check all positions, calculate wins/losses, report to Dom. Include: (1) Today's manual bets placed earlier, (2) Any auto-trader bets, (3) Total P&L. Run balance check and position check. Summarize results clearly.

🌡️ HOUSTON BET CHECK: Yesterday we bet $10 on Houston 75-76°F range (Tomorrow.io/GFS predicted 75-76°F vs NOAA's 79°F). Check: (1) What was the actual recorded high? (2) Did our bet win? (3) Check Kalshi balance/positions for settlement. Report results to Dom!

🌡️ KALSHI PAPER TRADE CHECK: Feb 14 paper bets should have settled. Check actual temps for Dallas (80°F NOAA), Houston (75°F), Minneapolis (47°F), Seattle (48°F). Update memory/kalshi-paper-trades.md with actual results. Calculate paper P/L. If strategy looks profitable, scan for new paper positions.

🌡️ KALSHI MORNING CHECK-IN: Markets for Feb 16 should be live now. (1) Pull fresh NWS forecasts for Minneapolis, Dallas, Denver, Chicago, Houston. (2) Verify edges still look good (6°F+ cushions). (3) Email Dom at dom@freedomandcoffee.co with final picks including REAL Kalshi market prices. Include any overnight forecast changes. This is for his manual paper trading.
